title: No More Naturalist Cooked Egg (Farmers Delight Compat)
description: That data pack removes the cooked egg from the Naturalist Mod (Farmers Delight Compat)
body: That data pack removes the cooked egg from the Naturalist Mod (Farmers Delight Compat) Requires the Mod: One Enough Item. What does this datapack do? 1: Removes all cooked egg recipes from the Naturalist Mod. 2: Replaces the cooked egg (Naturalist) to fried egg (Farmers Delight) 3: Full compatibility with Farmers Delight without conflicts. If you're playing with JEI, I recommend disabling TagContentTooltipEnabled = True to TagContentTooltipEnabled = false, to avoid displaying two identical fried eggs from the Farmers Delight mod
